summary: Comprehensive testing of Squarerootz AI EdTech platform Iteration 3 completed successfully. All new features implemented correctly including Google sign-in button, enrollment form page, navigation flow, updated course images, and Formspree integration. Backend APIs working (12/13 tests passed), all 10 courses displaying with updated images.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 400 for duplicate enrollment (test user already enrolled in ML course)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: This is correct behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: Navbar displays 'Sign in with Google' with Google SVG icon
Course detail 'Enroll Now' button navigates to /enroll/:slug correctly
Enrollment form page loads at /enroll/machine-learning with course summary and form
Enrollment form contains all required fields: Full Name, Email, Phone, Message
Course summary card shows title, price (₹1,49,999), duration (12 weeks), level (Intermediate), discount (40% OFF)
Enrollment form submits to Formspree endpoint (https://formspree.io/f/mpqjrrrn) successfully
Updated course images confirmed for AWS Agentic AI, Azure Agentic AI, and AIOps courses
All 10 courses accessible with correct pricing in lakh range (₹1,00,000 - ₹3,00,000)
Complete navigation flow: Courses → Course Detail → Enroll Form working correctly
Contact form loads independently and functions properly
Form submission shows success page with proper messaging and navigation buttons
Backend APIs working correctly (12/13 tests passed)
Course filtering and search functionality working
All course categories displaying correctly (Agentic AI, Core AI, Generative AI, Operations)
